calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Successor Trustees And Trust Asset
Off Calendar Sep-12-2018 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: David Yang for and with Barbara Barnes and Lisa Randolph.

The Court noted that the petition is seeking to have certain assets confirmed in the Trust and to determine the Beneficiaries, stated that it does not see how it can approve putting the property in the Trust when there is no paper work showing that the Trustor put it in the Trust, and that there is no clear intent. Mr. Yang referred to a letter dated April 2, 2006, stated that he has no idea why the property was not titled to Lillie as Trustee and that he will proceed with a petition for probate. The Court also raised the question as to why it would appoint Trustees or deal with Trust language when there is no property. The Petition for Order Confirming Successor Trustees and Trust Asset is denied.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

Petition For Order Confirming Successor Trustees And Trust Asset
Off Calendar Aug-01-2018 Continued To Sep-12-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
